---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for ai-engkit
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement you want.

## Problem / use case

What problem does this solve?

Who benefits from it?

## Proposed solution

Describe the approach you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you considered.

## Scope and impact

What areas would this likely affect?

- [ ] install flow
- [ ] upgrade flow
- [ ] Docker image
- [ ] runtime tooling
- [ ] authentication
- [ ] documentation
- [ ] testing
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] other

## Additional context

Add examples, screenshots, prior art, or related links.

## Language

You may write this request in English or Traditional Chinese.

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues first
- [ ] This is not a security report
- [ ] I described the problem and expected benefit
